r2AssetManifest.message: Ensure .asset-manifest.json is up to date after adding images

defaultDocumentToken.description: Ensure default document token matches Cortex version

hardcodedR2Credentials.description: Prevent hardcoded R2 credentials in source code
hardcodedR2Credentials.message: Never hardcode R2 credentials. Use environment variables.

localImagePaths.description: Detect hardcoded local image paths in production code
localImagePaths.message: Use R2Image or R2Picture components for CDN delivery instead of hardcoded paths

envFileCommitted.message: Never commit .env files. They contain sensitive credentials.

assetManifestCommitted.description: Prevent asset manifest from being committed
assetManifestCommitted.message: Asset manifest should be gitignored as it's regenerated on each sync

cdnDomainHardcoded.message: Consider using environment variable for CDN domain if it may change

missingAltText.description: Ensure all images have alt text for accessibility
missingAltText.message: All and elements must have descriptive alt text

consoleStatements.description: Detect console statements in production code
consoleStatements.message: Remove console.log statements before production deployment (or ensure Terser drops them)

typeScriptAny.description: Discourage use of 'any' type in TypeScript
typeScriptAny.message: Avoid 'any' type. Use specific types or 'unknown' with type guards.

unusedImports.message: Run ESLint to identify and remove unused imports

securityHeaders.description: Ensure security headers are configured in Cloudflare Workers
securityHeaders.message: Verify CSP, X-Frame-Options, and other security headers in wrangler.toml

responsiveImages.description: Ensure images use responsive srcset attributes
responsiveImages.message: Use R2Picture component with sizes prop for responsive image delivery

assetPipelineConfig.message: Ensure lib/assets/ scripts use environment variables for R2 credentials

buildSuccess.message: Run 'pnpm build' before committing to verify build integrity

typeCheck.message: Run 'pnpm type-check' to catch type errors before committing

lintCheck.message: Run 'pnpm lint' to maintain code quality standards

assetSyncBeforeDeploy.description: Remind to run assets:sync before deployment
assetSyncBeforeDeploy.message: Run 'pnpm run assets:sync' to upload latest optimized images to R2 before deploying

r2StorageQuota.description: Check R2 storage usage is within limits
r2StorageQuota.message: Run 'pnpm run assets:status' to verify storage usage is under 8GB (80% of 10GB free tier)

cdnVerification.message: Check browser DevTools Network tab to confirm images are served from cdn.josemianton.com with AVIF/WebP formats

accessibilityAudit.description: Run accessibility audit on new content
accessibilityAudit.message: Use Lighthouse or axe DevTools to verify WCAG 2.1 AA compliance
